words.def: a position in a grammatical linguistic construction in which a variety of alternative units are interchangeable
words.zh: n. 水溝, 細長孔, 硬幣投幣口, 縫, 狹槽, 狹通道, 位置, 一檔(廣播節目等)

words.def: people who are destined to die soon
words.zh: a. 失去的, 遺失的, 迷惑的

words.def: (often followed by `of') a large number or amount or extent
words.zh: n. 運氣, 籤, 抽籤, 份額, 許多, 一堆
